seo.title: JOB 1 - Fat-Burning HIIT Workout with Jennifer Jacobs
seo.description: Make the JOB 1 HIIT workout your top priority by investing just 20 minutes a day with trainer Jennifer Jacobs. Give your fitness the focus it deserves. Sign up today!

trainers.bioBodi: Jennifer Jacobs is an NASM certified personal trainer, nutrition coach, and fitness nutrition specialist, as well as a certified indoor cycling instructor through Schwinn and the AFAA. Known for her functional training workouts and heart-pounding classes, Jennifer will help you stay accountable and unleash your best self.

data.descriptionShort: Prioritize yourself with these 20 minute workouts.
data.descriptionLong: Invest in 20 minutes of time for YOU to help sculpt muscle, dial-in the fat-burn, and focus on your top priority—your health.

modules.categories: Cardio, HIIT, Strength, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss, Cycling, Core

modules.title: Is Job 1 right for me?
modules.content: You only have one body. It’s time to make yourself—and your health—Job 1. Created by world-class Super Trainer Jennifer Jacobs, Job 1 is a no-excuses, 4-week program with one requirement: give your fitness and nutrition the focus they deserve. Because when you show up for yourself, the results will follow—physically and in all aspects of your life.

modules.title: What are the workouts like?
modules.content: 20 minutes a day, 5 days a week. That’s it. Jennifer designed each workout to feel like a one-on-one personal training session with her. You’ll devote three days to resistance training to help build strength without adding bulk. You’ll also have one day of HIIT and one day of endurance cardio to help boost your stamina and dial-in your fat-burn. The best jobs keep you challenged, so no two workouts are the same—each one has a different structure to keep you progressing.

modules.title: Tools and Equipment
modules.content: For a quick overview of the program and your workout schedule, check out the Job 1 Get Started Guide and Calendar. The program also includes a Job 1 Notepad, where you can check off your workouts as a daily commitment to yourself. You’ll need light, medium, and heavy dumbbells, as well as resistance loops. A stationary bike is optional, but you’ll need one if you want to do Jennifer’s bonus cycling workouts. Looking to add a stationary bike to your workout setup? Visit Beachbody.MYXFitness.com to learn more about the MYX Home Studio.*

modules.title: Nutrition Programs Take Your Results Even Further
modules.content: Check out the Quick Start Nutrition Guide for an overview of Beachbody’s nutrition programs. These proven programs have been used by millions of people seeking to get control over food. 2B Mindset®, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, is a simple and easy approach to weight loss that focuses on what you CAN eat so you feel full, satisfied, and in control without ever having to count calories or measure food. Portion Fix®, created by Autumn Calabrese, takes the guesswork out of eating the right portions while still enjoying all your favorite foods. For sustainable weight loss, choose the program that best fits your lifestyle and goals. To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Jennifer Jacobs is an NASM certified personal trainer, nutrition coach, and fitness nutrition specialist, as well as a certified indoor cycling instructor through Schwinn and the AFAA. Known for her functional training workouts and heart-pounding classes, Jennifer will help you stay accountable and unleash your best self.

modules.title: Riki B. Lost 29.6 lbs. and 50.5 inches.
modules.testimonial: I have high blood pressure and want to be healthy for my two children...Job 1 makes changing your lifestyle simple, and the habits I have formed are changing my everyday life for the better.
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort and following Beachbody’s exercise and healthy eating plan. Results achieved in 3 months using Job 1 with Shakeology and Beachbody Performance supplements.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A87GsQY.title: Mediterranean 7-Layer Dip
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A87GsQY.descriptionLong: Jennifer joined 2B Mindset creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN in the kitchen to whip up one of her favorite dishes– a tasty Mediterranean 7-Layer Dip. Packed with lots of crunchy, nutritious veggies, Oil-Free Hummus, feta cheese crumbles, savory seasonings, and more, this dip tasty Mediterranean 7-Layer Dip is a high-fiber, high-protein lunch that’s super-easy to make in just 15 minutes. Serve with celery, endives, and carrots for dipping—and enjoy!

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZrkJ6B.descriptionLong: Watch this video to learn everything you need to start Job 1. You'll get an overview of the program, learn what equipment you need, get a brief introduction to the nutrition plan, and much more.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZrkLtn.title: Meet the Beachbody Performance Line
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZrkLtn.descriptionLong: Beachbody Performance is your all-in-one system of powerful supplements—a breakthrough in performance nutrition designed to help give your body what it needs to make every second count, every single time. To learn more, visit www.beachbodyperformance.com.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZrkPBb.title: Introduction to 2B Mindset
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZrkPBb.descriptionLong: 2B Mindset is a video-based weight-loss program that is a simple, easy and positive approach to weight loss. You’ll be able to eat what you want and enjoy it—free of guilt. Once you adopt Ilana’s proven mindset, you can live your life, go to parties, eat at restaurants, enjoy a big, satisfying meal with your family, and still lose weight. With BODi, you'll get the ongoing support and accountability you need plus access to exclusive recipes, meal plans and Ilana’s best strategies and tactics to help guide and motivate you to stay on top of your priorities so you can keep the weight off.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.
